classes.name: active
classes.rule: background: var(--control-active-bg); color: var(--control-active-text);

classes.name: app
classes.rule: display: flex; height: calc(100vh - var(--topbar-h)); height: calc(100dvh - var(--topbar-h));

classes.name: brand
classes.rule: display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 10px; min-width: 260px;

classes.name: brand-mark
classes.rule: width: 17px; height: 17px; color: var(--text); align-self: center;

classes.name: brand-name
classes.rule: font-family: var(--font-display); font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; letter-spacing: 0.08em;

classes.name: brand-sub
classes.rule: font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10.5px; color: var(--text-dim); letter-spacing: 0.04em;

classes.name: btn
classes.rule: display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; height: 33px; padding: 0 14px; border-radius: var(--radius-s); border: 1px solid var(--line); background: var(--button-bg); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 var(--glass-hi), var(--shadow-soft); color: var(--text); font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: background 160ms ease, border-color 160ms ease, transform 140ms cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1); white-space: nowrap;

classes.name: btn-ghost
classes.rule: background: transparent; border-color: transparent; box-shadow: none; color: var(--text-mid);

classes.name: btn-primary
classes.rule: background: var(--primary-bg); border-color: var(--primary-bg); color: var(--primary-text); box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);

classes.name: canvas-frame
classes.rule: flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 34px 40px 18px; min-height: 0; contain: layout paint; isolation: isolate;

classes.name: canvas-shell
classes.rule: position: relative; max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%; overflow: hidden; border-radius: var(--radius-l); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--line), inset 0 1px 0 var(--glass-hi), var(--shadow-strong); background: #000; contain: layout paint; isolation: isolate;

classes.name: ctl
classes.rule: margin-bottom: 11px;

classes.name: ctl-head
classes.rule: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; margin-bottom: 5px;

classes.name: ctl-label
classes.rule: font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-mid);

classes.name: ctl-value
classes.rule: font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10.5px; color: var(--text-dim); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;

classes.name: custom-select
classes.rule: position: relative; flex: 1;

classes.name: custom-select-icon
classes.rule: position: absolute; right: 6px; display: flex; color: var(--text-mid); pointer-events: none;

classes.name: custom-select-option
classes.rule: width: 100%; text-align: left; background: transparent; border: none; border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 8px; color: var(--text); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 11px; cursor: pointer;

classes.name: custom-select-popover
classes.rule: position: absolute; top: calc(100% + 4px); left: 0; width: 100%; background: var(--surface-elevated); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: var(--radius-s); box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft); z-index: 1000; display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding: 4px; gap: 2px;

classes.name: custom-select-trigger
classes.rule: width: 100%; background: var(--bg-raised); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: var(--radius-s); color: var(--text); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 11px; height: 28px; padding: 0 22px 0 8px; text-align: left; outline: none; cursor: pointer; position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;

classes.name: dim
classes.rule: color: var(--text-dim);

classes.name: dx-action
classes.rule: display: inline-grid; place-items: center; background: hsl(var(--foreground)); color: hsl(var(--background));

classes.name: dx-card
classes.rule: width: min(100%, 76rem); border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: var(--radius); background: hsl(var(--card)); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 hsl(var(--foreground) / 0.04) inset; padding: clamp(1.25rem, 3vw, 2.25rem);

classes.name: dx-grid
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(18rem, 100%), 1fr)); gap: 1rem;

classes.name: dx-muted
classes.rule: color: hsl(var(--muted));

classes.name: dx-page-shell
classes.rule: align-items: center;

classes.name: dx-secondary-action
classes.rule: min-height: 2.65rem; border-radius: var(--radius); border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); padding: 0.7rem 1rem; font: inherit; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.16s, border-color 0.16s, background 0.16s;

classes.name: dx-shader-root
classes.rule: display: block; min-height: 100vh;

classes.name: dx-shell
classes.rule: min-height: 100vh; display: grid; place-items: center; padding: clamp(1rem, 3vw, 3rem);

classes.name: dx-stack
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 1rem;

classes.name: dx-template
classes.rule: min-height: 100vh; background: hsl(var(--background)); color: hsl(var(--foreground));

classes.name: export-btn
classes.rule: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; width: 100%; height: 40px; padding: 0 14px; border-radius: var(--radius-s); border: 1px solid var(--line); background: var(--button-bg); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 var(--glass-hi); color: var(--text); font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 500; transition: background 160ms ease, border-color 160ms ease, transform 160ms cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);

classes.name: export-grid
classes.rule: display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; margin-top: 4px; contain: layout paint;

classes.name: ext
classes.rule: margin-left: auto; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-dim); letter-spacing: 0.06em;

classes.name: field-row
classes.rule: display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 11px;

classes.name: fx-layer
classes.rule: position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 80; pointer-events: none; contain: paint;

classes.name: fx-ring
classes.rule: position: fixed; width: 180px; height: 180px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid var(--focus); z-index: 80; pointer-events: none; animation: fx-ring 700ms cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.3,1) forwards; contain: layout paint;

classes.name: h-16
classes.rule: height: calc(var(--spacing) * 16);

classes.name: hidden
classes.rule: display: none;

classes.name: icon-btn
classes.rule: width: 28px; height: 28px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: var(--radius-s); color: var(--text-mid); transition: background 130ms ease, color 130ms ease;

classes.name: is-hidden
classes.rule: display: none;

classes.name: lock-box
classes.rule: width: 14px; height: 14px; border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 4px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: background 120ms ease, border-color 120ms ease;

classes.name: meta-item
classes.rule: font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.03em;

classes.name: meta-right
classes.rule: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;

classes.name: meta-sep
classes.rule: width: 3px; height: 3px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--line);

classes.name: mini-btn
classes.rule: height: 28px; padding: 0 10px; border-radius: var(--radius-s); border: 1px solid var(--line); background: var(--bg-raised); color: var(--text-mid); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; transition: background 120ms ease, color 120ms ease; white-space: nowrap;

classes.name: modal-actions
classes.rule: display: flex; justify-content: flex-end;

classes.name: modal-backdrop
classes.rule: position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 40; background: var(--overlay-bg); backdrop-filter: none; -webkit-backdrop-filter: none; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 24px; animation: backdrop-in 220ms ease; contain: layout paint; isolation: isolate;

classes.name: modal-card
classes.rule: width: min(560px, 100%); max-height: 88vh; max-height: min(88dvh, calc(100dvh - 48px - env(safe-area-inset-bottom))); overflow-y: auto; background: var(--modal-bg); backdrop-filter: none; -webkit-backdrop-filter: none; border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: var(--radius-l); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 var(--glass-hi), var(--shadow-strong); padding: 20px 22px 22px; animation: card-in 320ms cubic-bezier(.22,1.3,.36,1); scrollbar-width: thin; scrollbar-color: var(--scroll-thumb) transparent; contain: layout paint; overscroll-behavior: contain;

classes.name: modal-close
classes.rule: width: 28px; height: 28px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 8px; color: var(--text-dim); transition: background 130ms ease, color 130ms ease, transform 160ms ease;

classes.name: modal-dl
classes.rule: height: 38px; padding: 0 18px; font-size: 13px;

classes.name: modal-form
classes.rule: display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; margin-bottom: 14px;

classes.name: modal-head
classes.rule: display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 16px;

classes.name: modal-note
classes.rule: font-size: 11.5px; color: var(--text-mid); line-height: 1.55; margin-bottom: 14px;

classes.name: modal-preview
classes.rule: position: relative; border-radius: var(--radius-m); overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 16px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--line), var(--shadow-soft); contain: layout paint;

classes.name: modal-preview-meta
classes.rule: position: absolute; left: 10px; bottom: 8px; font-size: 10px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); background: rgba(8,8,12,0.72); backdrop-filter: none; -webkit-backdrop-filter: none; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 7px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; contain: paint;

classes.name: modal-sub
classes.rule: font-size: 10.5px; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: 3px;

classes.name: modal-title
classes.rule: font-family: var(--font-display); font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; letter-spacing: 0.01em;

classes.name: mode-card
classes.rule: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 9px 2px 8px; border-radius: var(--radius-s); border: 1px solid var(--line-soft); background: var(--button-bg); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 var(--glass-hi); color: var(--text-dim); transition: border-color 160ms ease, color 160ms ease, background 160ms ease, transform 180ms cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);

classes.name: mode-grid
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 6px;

classes.name: mono
classes.rule: font-family: var(--font-mono);

classes.name: num-input
classes.rule: background: var(--bg-raised); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: var(--radius-s); color: var(--text); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 11px; height: 28px; padding: 0 8px; outline: none;

classes.name: on
classes.rule: background: var(--primary-bg);

classes.name: overlay
classes.rule: position: fixed; inset: 0; background: var(--overlay-bg); backdrop-filter: none; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; z-index: 50; contain: layout paint; isolation: isolate;

classes.name: overlay-cancel
classes.rule: width: 100%; justify-content: center;

classes.name: overlay-card
classes.rule: width: 320px; background: var(--bg-rail); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 12px; padding: 22px 22px 18px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-strong); contain: layout paint;

classes.name: overlay-detail
classes.rule: font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-dim); margin-bottom: 14px;

classes.name: overlay-title
classes.rule: font-family: var(--font-display); font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: 0.02em; margin-bottom: 6px;

classes.name: p-2
classes.rule: padding: calc(var(--spacing) * 2);

classes.name: preset-chip
classes.rule: height: 22px; width: 46px; border-radius: 5px; border: 1px solid var(--line-soft); overflow: hidden; display: flex; padding: 0; transition: transform 100ms ease, border-color 120ms ease;

classes.name: preset-row
classes.rule: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 14px;

classes.name: progress
classes.rule: height: 4px; border-radius: 2px; background: var(--surface-muted); overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 16px; contain: paint;

classes.name: progress-fill
classes.rule: height: 100%; width: 100%; border-radius: 2px; background: var(--primary-bg); transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left center; transition: transform 160ms ease;

classes.name: rail
classes.rule: width: var(--rail-w); flex: none; background: var(--bg-rail); backdrop-filter: none; -webkit-backdrop-filter: none; border-left: 1px solid var(--line-soft); box-shadow: inset 1px 0 0 var(--line-soft); overflow-y: auto; overscroll-behavior: contain; scrollbar-width: thin; scrollbar-color: var(--scroll-thumb) transparent; contain: layout paint;

classes.name: rail-section
classes.rule: border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line-soft); padding: 14px 16px 17px; contain: layout paint;

classes.name: saved-chip
classes.rule: display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; height: 25px; padding: 0 5px 0 10px; border-radius: 13px; border: 1px solid var(--line); background: var(--button-bg); color: var(--text-mid); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.03em; transition: color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease, transform 150ms cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);

classes.name: saved-del
classes.rule: width: 15px; height: 15px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 50%; font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-dim); transition: background 130ms ease, color 130ms ease;

classes.name: saved-styles
classes.rule: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; margin-top: 10px; contain: layout paint;

classes.name: section-dice
classes.rule: width: 24px; height: 24px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 5px; color: var(--text-dim); transition: background 120ms ease, color 120ms ease, transform 80ms ease;

classes.name: section-head
classes.rule: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 12px;

classes.name: section-title
classes.rule: font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: var(--text-dim); text-transform: uppercase;

classes.name: seed-row
classes.rule: display: flex; gap: 6px; align-items: center;

classes.name: segmented
classes.rule: display: inline-flex; background: var(--bg-raised); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: var(--radius-s); padding: 2px; gap: 2px;

classes.name: set-grid
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 16px; contain: layout; isolation: isolate;

classes.name: set-tile
classes.rule: position: relative; border-radius: var(--radius-s); overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--line); padding: 0; transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1), border-color 160ms ease; contain: layout paint;

classes.name: set-tile-label
classes.rule: position: absolute; left: 6px; bottom: 5px; font-size: 9px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); background: rgba(8,8,12,0.55); padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 5px;

classes.name: shader-loader
classes.rule: position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 4; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 28px; background: var(--loader-bg); backdrop-filter: none; transition: opacity 260ms ease, visibility 260ms ease; contain: layout paint; isolation: isolate;

classes.name: shader-loader-action
classes.rule: grid-column: 1 / -1; height: 34px; border-radius: var(--radius-s); border: 1px solid var(--line); background: var(--primary-bg); color: var(--primary-text); font-weight: 600;

classes.name: shader-loader-copy
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 4px; min-width: 0;

classes.name: shader-loader-detail
classes.rule: font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10.5px; color: var(--text-dim);

classes.name: shader-loader-dx
classes.rule: width: 20px; height: 20px;

classes.name: shader-loader-mark
classes.rule: width: 44px; height: 44px; display: grid; place-items: center; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--primary-bg); color: var(--primary-text); box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);

classes.name: shader-loader-panel
classes.rule: position: relative; width: min(360px, 100%); display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto 1fr; gap: 14px; align-items: center; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: var(--radius-m); padding: 18px; background: var(--loader-panel-bg); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 var(--glass-hi), var(--shadow-strong); contain: layout paint;

classes.name: shader-loader-shimmer
classes.rule: position: absolute; inset: 0; transform: translateX(-120%); background: var(--loader-shimmer); animation: none; pointer-events: none; contain: paint;

classes.name: shader-loader-spinner
classes.rule: position: absolute; width: 62px; height: 62px; color: var(--text-mid); animation: none;

classes.name: shader-loader-title
classes.rule: font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600;

classes.name: shader-static-detail
classes.rule: position: relative; z-index: 1; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-mid);

classes.name: shader-static-fallback
classes.rule: position: absolute; inset: 0; display: grid; place-content: center; gap: 8px; min-width: 240px; min-height: 180px; padding: 28px; overflow: hidden; text-align: center; color: var(--text); contain: layout paint; isolation: isolate; background: radial-gradient(circle at 28% 24%, rgba(129, 224, 255, 0.22), transparent 28%), radial-gradient(circle at 72% 72%, rgba(255, 137, 84, 0.16), transparent 32%), linear-gradient(135deg, #08080a, #15161a 52%, #050507);

classes.name: shader-static-title
classes.rule: position: relative; z-index: 1; font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 22px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.16em;

classes.name: share-input
classes.rule: width: 100%; text-align: left; color: var(--text-mid);

classes.name: share-row
classes.rule: display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 10px;

classes.name: stage
classes.rule: flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: var(--stage-radial); min-width: 0; position: relative; contain: layout paint; isolation: isolate;

classes.name: stage-meta
classes.rule: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 22px 14px; flex: none;

classes.name: stagger-item
classes.rule: animation: intro-pop 560ms cubic-bezier(.22,1.3,.36,1) both; animation-delay: var(--intro-d, 0ms);

classes.name: style-lock
classes.rule: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-top: 10px; color: var(--text-dim); font-size: 11.5px; user-select: none; cursor: pointer;

classes.name: success
classes.rule: display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 9px; border-color: var(--success-border); box-shadow: var(--success-shadow); animation: toast-success-pop 420ms cubic-bezier(.22,1.4,.36,1);

classes.name: swatch
classes.rule: position: relative; width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--line); overflow: hidden; flex: none; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 100ms ease;

classes.name: swatch-gap
classes.rule: width: 1px; height: 30px; background: var(--line); margin: 0 3px; align-self: flex-start; margin-top: 2px;

classes.name: swatch-label
classes.rule: font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 9px; color: var(--text-dim); text-align: center; margin-top: 4px; letter-spacing: 0.05em;

classes.name: swatch-row
classes.rule: display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 14px;

classes.name: swatch-wrap
classes.rule: display: flex; flex-direction: column;

classes.name: synth-ctl
classes.rule: margin-top: 8px;

classes.name: synth-row
classes.rule: margin-top: 10px;

classes.name: toast
classes.rule: position: fixed; bottom: max(22px, calc(env(safe-area-inset-bottom) + 14px)); left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); background: var(--bg-raised); border: 1px solid var(--line); color: var(--text); font-size: 11.5px; padding: 9px 16px; border-radius: 8px; z-index: 60; box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft); animation: toast-in 200ms ease; contain: layout paint;

classes.name: toggle
classes.rule: position: relative; width: 30px; height: 17px; border-radius: 9px; background: var(--surface-muted); transition: background 140ms ease; flex: none;

classes.name: toggle-row
classes.rule: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 11px;

classes.name: topbar
classes.rule: height: var(--topbar-h); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 14px 0 18px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line-soft); background: var(--chrome-bg); backdrop-filter: none; -webkit-backdrop-filter: none; position: relative; z-index: 5;

classes.name: topbar-actions
classes.rule: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; min-width: 260px; justify-content: flex-end;

classes.name: topbar-center
classes.rule: display: flex; justify-content: center;

classes.name: topbar-divider
classes.rule: width: 1px; height: 22px; background: var(--line); margin: 0 4px;

classes.name: w-16
classes.rule: width: calc(var(--spacing) * 16);
